rows.label: qev085702_MSG0001
rows.name: Sorry about this. The truth is, I'd rather tell you over a drink...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0002
rows.name: But you never know who's listening in those kinds of places.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0003
rows.name: Don't worry about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0004
rows.name: Take a look at this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0005
rows.name: The truth is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0006
rows.name: It seems there's been a massive outbreak of native creatures categorized as high-risk targets right here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0007
rows.name:
This place...
It's a Frontier Net Spot, wasn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0008
rows.name: If the Data Probe gets obstructed, our Miranium supply will stagnate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0009
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0010
rows.name:
Old man Vandham is putting up a hefty reward for it.
Look, they're paying this much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0011
rows.name:
Amazing!
I've never seen a reward this high for an extermination mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0012
rows.name: Naturally. This is likely a mission planned under the assumption that over ten teams would handle it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0013
rows.name: Ah, so that's how it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0014
rows.name: True, if you divide it among that many people, it's just a normal reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0015
rows.name: The real point is that it hasn't been officially posted yet, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0016
rows.name: Right now, it's possible for us to complete the mission ourselves and monopolize the reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0017
rows.name: How did you get your hands on this information?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0018
rows.name:
Don't ask me that.
Let's just say there's someone at HQ with a weakness for gambling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0019
rows.name: You basically just answered her question, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0020
rows.name: Well, it's definitely a sweet deal, wouldn't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0021
rows.name: It'd be too much for me to handle alone, but if you guys lend a hand, we can pull it off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0022
rows.name: What do you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0023
rows.name:
Let me think...
What are your thoughts on this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_JNK0010
rows.name: Monopolize

rows.label: qev085702_SEL0011
rows.name: Suggest that your team should do it alone.

rows.label: qev085702_JNK0020
rows.name: Negotiate

rows.label: qev085702_SEL0021
rows.name: Demand seventy percent of the reward.

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0024
rows.name: True, it isn't impossible for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0025
rows.name: Then, it's fine if we treat this mission as first-come, first-served, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0026
rows.name: I wish you luck, Doug.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0027
rows.name:
H-Hey, wait a minute!
You can't do that with information I brought to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0028
rows.name: Good grief, even Elma has a mean streak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0029
rows.name: H-Hey, that was just a joke earlier, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0030
rows.name: True, if we consider our relative combat strength, that distribution ratio might actually be accurate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hey, wait a minute.
You can't do that with information I brought to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0032
rows.name:
I won't charge an information fee, so let's make it a fifty-fifty split.
Come on, that's fair, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0033
rows.name: Alright. I'm keeping this a strict secret from my own team this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085702_MSG0034
rows.name: So I'll be tagging along with you guys.[ST:wait ]
